item.description: Champagne Supernova # #2026-05-04 How many special people change? 얼마나 많은 특별한 사람들이 변할까? How many lives are living strange? 얼마나 많은 사람들이 이상한 삶을 살까? Where were you while we were getting high? 넌 어디 있었니, 우리가 취해 있을 때? Slowly walking down the hall 천천히 복도를 걸어가고 있어 Faster than a cannonball 포탄보다 빠르게 Where were you while we were getting high? 넌 어디 있었니, 우리가 취해 있을 때?
